name: wan-comfyui
docker_command: bash -lc 'command -v git >/dev/null 2>&1 || (apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends ca-certificates git && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*); cd /workspace && if [ ! -d wan ]; then git clone https://github.com/grawthings-beep/wan.git wan; else git -C wan pull --ff-only; fi && cd wan && bash runpod/start.sh'
manual_model_note: Place Civitai Wan diffusion models in /workspace/ComfyUI/models/unet for GGUF or /workspace/ComfyUI/models/diffusion_models for FP8.
